step_rationale: Post-translationally modified LDL; oxidative lipoprotein species driving atherogenesis.
mechanism: Carbamylated LDL is an oxidatively modified lipoprotein variant retained in the subendothelium that triggers macrophage activation and plaque inflammation.

references.title: Lipoproteins and Cardiovascular Redox Signaling: Role in Atherosclerosis and Coronary Disease.
